strings.site.name: CodeWF
strings.site.description: CodeWF brings together .NET articles, project docs, and online developer tools.
strings.nav.blogLead: Start with articles, then browse by albums or categories
strings.footer.tagline: Technical articles, project docs, and online tools

textMap.加密、安全和随机标识类在线工具。: Online tools for encryption, security, and random identifiers.
textMap.按指定长度和字符集生成随机字符串，可用于临时令牌、测试密码和标识符。: Use this online tool for Token Generator.
textMap.对文本计算 MD5、SHA1、SHA256、SHA384、SHA512、SHA3: Use this online tool for Hash Text.
textMap.使用 bcrypt 对文本进行哈希，并可与已有 bcrypt 哈希值进行校验。: Use this online tool for Bcrypt.
textMap.生成 UUID v4 或 Nil UUID，适合测试数据、临时标识和分布式唯一: Use this online tool for UUID Generator.
textMap.生成可按时间排序的 ULID，适合日志、事件和数据库标识符。: Use this online tool for ULID Generator.
textMap.使用 AES、TripleDES、RC4 或 Rabbit 等算法对文本进行加密: Use this online tool for Encryption.
textMap.生成 BIP39 助记词短语，便于学习和测试助记词相关流程。: Use this online tool for Bip39 Generator.
textMap.使用密钥和指定哈希算法生成 HMAC 消息认证码。: Use this online tool for Hmac Generator.
textMap.在浏览器中生成 RSA 私钥和公钥，并以 PEM 格式输出。: Use this online tool for RSA Key Pair Generator.
textMap.估算密码长度、字符类别、熵值和离线暴力破解所需时间。: Use this online tool for Password Strength Analyser.
textMap.检查 PDF 文件中是否存在签名相关结构标记，辅助判断文件是否可能带签名。: Use this online tool for PDF Signature Checker.
textMap.格式、文本、日期和数值转换工具。: Tools for formats, text, dates, and numeric conversion.

textMap.在 Hex、RGB 和 HSL 等常见颜色格式之间转换。: Use this online tool for Color Converter.
textMap.将文本转换为 camelCase、PascalCase、snake_case、k: Use this online tool for Case Converter.

textMap.如果码坊的内容对你有帮助，欢迎通过赞助支持持续更新。: If CodeWF has helped you, sponsorship helps keep it updated.
textMap.如果这里的内容和工具帮到了你，欢迎通过赞助支持站点继续维护与更新。: If the content and tools here helped you, sponsorship supports ongoing maintenance and updates.
textMap.如果暂时不赞助，也欢迎继续阅读、订阅或反馈建议。: If sponsorship is not for now, reading, subscribing, and feedback are also welcome.
textMap.浏览码坊的开源项目与 NuGet 包说明，按主题快速定位内容。: Browse CodeWF open-source projects and NuGet package docs by topic.
textMap.这里集中整理开源项目、NuGet 包以及对应的使用说明，方便快速查阅和持续维护。: Open-source projects, NuGet packages, and usage notes are organized here for quick lookup and maintenance.
textMap.项目内容暂未就绪: Project content is not ready yet
textMap.可以稍后再来查看，或先浏览博客里的技术文章。: Please check back later, or browse technical articles in the blog first.
textMap.项目不存在或已删除: The project does not exist or has been removed
textMap.可以返回项目中心查看其他内容。: Return to the project center to view other content.
textMap.查看码坊站点和内容建设的时间线记录。: View the timeline of CodeWF site and content updates.
textMap.用时间轴回看站点的迭代与内容节点，让长期建设更容易被感知。: Review site iterations and content milestones on a timeline.
textMap.后续的关键版本和里程碑会展示在这里。: Future versions and milestones will appear here.
textMap.了解码坊的定位、内容方向与维护理念。: Learn about CodeWF positioning, content direction, and maintenance philosophy.
textMap.一个把文章、项目和工具串起来的技术站点: A technical site connecting articles, projects, and tools
textMap.码坊聚焦 .NET 与工程实践，希望把可复用的知识、可检索的项目说明和能直接落地: CodeWF focuses on .NET and engineering practice, turning reusable knowledge, searchable project docs, and practical tools into a stable entry point.
textMap.关于页的详细介绍暂时还没有加载出来，稍后可以再来看看。: The about page details are not loaded yet. Please check again later.
textMap.一个入口检索站内内容，优先返回最相关的工具、项目说明与技术文章。: Search site content from one entry point, prioritizing relevant tools, project docs, and technical articles.
textMap.输入项目、工具或文章关键字: Enter project, tool, or article keywords
textMap.可以直接搜索项目名、包名、工具名、文章标题或正文里的技术关键词。: Search by project name, package name, tool name, article title, or technical terms in content.
textMap.可以试试更短的关键词，或者直接搜索项目名、包名、工具名和文章标题中的核心词。: Try shorter keywords, or search core terms from project names, package names, tool names, and article titles.
textMap.浏览码坊博客内容，按时间查看最新技术文章。: Browse CodeWF blog content and latest technical articles by time.
textMap.这里收录站点的文章正文，覆盖 .NET、桌面开发、工程实践与通用开发话题。: This area collects articles covering .NET, desktop development, engineering practice, and general development topics.
textMap.这里会轮换一些值得顺手点开的文章。: A rotating set of articles worth opening will appear here.
textMap.当前博客列表为空，后续内容会在这里展示。: The blog list is empty for now. Future content will appear here.
textMap.按分类浏览，更快定位你想看的技术主题。: Browse by category to find technical topics faster.
textMap.用工程视角记录 .NET 与现代开发: Recording .NET and modern development from an engineering perspective
textMap.深入框架、源码实践、工具链与真实项目经验，沉淀可复用的技术判断。: Deep dives into frameworks, source practice, toolchains, and real project experience, distilled into reusable technical judgment.
textMap.内容整理中，稍后会补上更多随机发现入口。: Content is being organized; more random discovery entries will be added later.
textMap.后续会在这里展示全部文章分类。: All article categories will be shown here later.
textMap.这个分类下还没有文章: No articles in this category yet
textMap.可以先去首页或博客列表看看其他内容。: You can visit the home page or blog list for other content.
textMap.后续会在这里展示全部专题。: All albums will be shown here later.
textMap.该专题下暂无文章: No articles in this album yet
textMap.可以先返回博客首页，或切换到其他专题继续浏览。: Return to the blog home page or switch to another album.
textMap.按标签快速聚合站内文章。: Quickly group site articles by tag.
textMap.后续会在这里展示文章标签。: Article tags will appear here later.
textMap.这个标签下还没有文章: No articles under this tag yet
textMap.可以返回标签列表或博客首页继续浏览。: Return to the tag list or blog home page to continue browsing.
textMap.文章不存在或已下线: The article does not exist or is offline
textMap.可以返回博客首页继续浏览其他内容。: Return to the blog home page to browse other content.
